config.script:
'------------------------------- definicja storage ------------------- class cexpfilter '--- members ---- private m_strNazwa private m_strVBCode private m_pModuleExport private m_pModuleEBHelper private m_pXMLExpManager private m_nLastError
'--- init / done ---- public sub class_initialize() m_strNazwa = "" m_strVBCode = ""
init_all end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK clean_all end sub
private sub clean_all() set m_pXMLExpManager = nothing set m_pModuleExport = nothing end sub
private sub init_all() set m_pXMLExpManager = nothing set m_pModuleExport = doc_.getmodule(60210) set m_pModuleEBHelper = doc_.getmodule(60212) m_nLastError = 0 end sub '----- properties ----- public property get nazwa() nazwa = m_strNazwa end property
public property let nazwa(strNazwa) m_strNazwa = strNazwa end property
public property get vbcode() vbcode = m_strVBCode end property
public property let vbcode(strVBCode) m_strVBCode = strVBCode end property
public function is_valid() is_valid = (trim(nazwa) <> "") end function
'----- API ----- public function exportobj(byref pObject) exportobj = m_nLastError if m_nLastError <> 0 then exit function end if m_nLastError = m_pXMLExpManager.std_export_any_object(pObject.type,pObject) exportobj = m_nLastError end function
public function exportsetex(byval nTypeID, byval strWhere, byval strOrderBy, byval strJoin) exportsetex = m_nLastError if m_nLastError <> 0 then exit function end if dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(nTypeID, strWhere, strOrderBy, strJoin) m_nLastError = m_pModuleExport.std_export_cursor(m_pXMLExpManager,pCursor) exportsetex = m_nLastError end function
public function exportset(byval nTypeID, byval strWhere) exportset = exportsetex(nTypeID, strWhere, "", "") end function
public property let importmode(byval nTypeID,byval nValue) m_pXMLExpManager.importmode(nTypeId) = nValue end property
'----- internal ----- public function prepare_export() set prepare_export = preprare_export_ex(doc_.createstreamobj()) end function
public function preprare_export_ex(byref pSO) set m_pXMLExpManager = m_pModuleExport.new_export_handler() m_pXMLExpManager.start_export pSO,0, m_strNazwa m_pModuleEBHelper.init_for_EB5 m_pXMLExpManager set preprare_export_ex = pSO end function
public function done_export(byref pSO,strDestFileName) m_pXMLExpManager.stop_export if strDestFileName <> "" then pSO.save strDestFileName end if
set m_pXMLExpManager = nothing done_export = m_nLastError end function
public function perform(byval strDestFileName) dim pSO : set pSO = prepare_export()
with Me execute m_strVBCode end with
perform = done_export(pSO,strDestFileName) end function
public function perform_to_stream() set perform_to_stream = nothing
dim pSO : set pSO = prepare_export()
with Me execute m_strVBCode end with
m_pXMLExpManager.stop_export set m_pXMLExpManager = nothing
if m_nLastError = 0 then set perform_to_stream = pSO end if
end function
public function perform_remote(byval strDestClient,byval strUser,byval strPassword) dim pSO : set pSO = prepare_export()
with Me execute m_strVBCode end with
m_pXMLExpManager.stop_export if m_nLastError <> 0 then perform_remote = m_nLastError exit function end if set m_pXMLExpManager = nothing
'establish remote connection dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214) dim pRemoteConn : set pRemoteConn = pM60214.new_remote_client(strDestClient) if pRemoteConn is nothing then perform_remote = -1 exit function end if
dim pRM60211 : set pRM60211 = pRemoteConn.document.getmodule(60211)
if not pRemoteConn.document.getmodule(60121).remote_system_init(strUser,strPassword) then trans_.message 0,0, "Zalogowanie się do systemu na " + strDestClient +_ " nieudane. Sprawdź nazwę użytkownika i hasło" perform_remote = -2 exit function end if
dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa wczytywanie danych przez " + strDestClient) m_nLastError = pRM60211.import_nxd_stream_2_EB(pSO)
perform_remote = m_nLastError end function
'wersja exportuje obiekt po obiekcie - fajne, działa ale wolne public function perform_remote_obj_by_obj(byval strDestClient) init_all
'establish remote connection dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214) dim pRemoteConn : set pRemoteConn = pM60214.new_remote_client(strDestClient) if pRemoteConn is nothing then perform_remote = -1 exit function end if
'create exp manager set m_pXMLExpManager = m_pModuleExport.new_export_handler()
dim pRM60211 : set pRM60211 = pRemoteConn.document.getmodule(60211) dim pRImportHolder : set pRImportHolder = pRM60211.new_import_nxd_2_EB_holder() 'connect both m_pXMLExpManager.set_importer pRImportHolder.get_handler() dim pDummySO : set pDummySO = pRemoteConn.document.createstreamobj() m_pXMLExpManager.start_export pDummySO,0, m_strNazwa
m_pModuleEBHelper.init_for_EB5 m_pXMLExpManager
with Me execute m_strVBCode end with
m_pXMLExpManager.stop_export
clean_all
perform_remote = m_nLastError end function end class
function new_exp_filter() set new_exp_filter = new cexpfilter end function
'------------------------------- load / save ------------------------
function save_data(byref pNAVOArray,byref pDestStream) dim pExporter : set pExporter = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.exportpackage") pDestStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbCrLf pExporter.ostream pDestStream
dim pMsg : set pMsg = pExporter.newmsg
pMsg.header.save dim iter for iter = 0 to pNAVOArray.Count() - 1 if pNAVOArray.Value(iter).is_valid() then dim pExpObj: set pExpObj = pMsg.newobj(1,1+iter) pExpObj("nazwa") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).nazwa pExpObj("vbcode") = pNAVOArray.Value(iter).vbcode pExpObj.save else trans_.message 7000,0, "Nazwa jest wymagana" save_data = false exit function end if next
pMsg.save pExporter.save save_data = true end function
class cimportparser private m_pNAVOArray
public sub init(byref pNAVOArray) set m_pNAVOArray = pNAVOArray end sub
public sub OnMessageBegin(byref pMsgObj,byref bBreak) m_pNAVOArray.RemoveAll end sub
public sub OnMessageEnd(pMsgObj,byref bBreak) end sub
public sub OnObject(pObject,byref bBreak) dim pAFD : set pAFD = new_exp_filter() pAFD.nazwa = pObject("nazwa") pAFD.vbcode = pObject("vbcode") m_pNAVOArray.Add(pAFD) end sub
end class
function load_data(byref pNAVOArray,byref pSrcStream) dim pImporter : set pImporter = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.importpackage") dim pImportParser : set pImportParser = new cimportparser pImportParser.init pNAVOArray
pImporter.sink = pImportParser pImporter.istream pSrcStream pImporter.go end function
'------------- mainly for remote operations function perform_pull_export(byval strVBCode) dim pEF : set pEF = new_exp_filter() pEF.vbcode = strVBCode set perform_pull_export = pEF.perform_to_stream() if not perform_pull_export is nothing then perform_pull_export.rewind end if end function
